metadata.purpose: Documented corrections for material Umalator modeling limitations, plus a small independent positioning component. Rules are matched by stable catalog_key, never by MDB ID.

operations.floor: Raise the automatic performance weight to at least this value.
operations.cap: Lower the automatic performance weight to at most this value.
operations.positioning_rules: Add a small strategic positioning bonus after performance scoring; total positioning bonus is capped at 0.30.

nimble_navigator.notes: Umalator strongly overestimates Front Runner blocking. The skill remains strong enough elsewhere that moderate over-weighting outside Front is acceptable.

rules.reason: Front Runners aim to lead and are rarely blocked in the last spurt.

uma_stan.notes: Umalator does not model repeated activations reliably. Uma Stan has a short cooldown and can proc several times; it is strong outside Front Runner.

rules.reason: Front Runners spend less time packed close to at least three other runners.
At least one useful activation is common; the simulator misses repeat value.
Longer race duration increases the opportunity for repeated activations.
Multi-proc potential makes the skill a top inheritance target.
Long races maximize repeat-proc potential and pack interaction time.

groundwork.notes: The simulator returns a false zero because it does not provide the early skill activation chain required by Groundwork. It is a major Front Runner inheritance target when the build can trigger it.

rules.reason: Important opening acceleration, with a demanding trigger.
Core Front Runner opening acceleration when three early skills are planned.
Commonly build-defining for competitive Front Runner setups.
Commonly build-defining for competitive Front Runner setups.

positioning_rules.reason: Early acceleration helps establish and protect the lead beyond its direct simulated time gain.

dodging_danger.notes: Lane movement and surrounding behavior are disabled/simplified in the batch, producing a false zero. This is a Front Runner positioning tool.

rules.reason: Reliable strategic value when a Front Runner risks being surrounded early.

positioning_rules.reason: Avoiding early enclosure protects the intended race position.

prudent_positioning.notes: Navigation value is not translated into time gain by the simulator. It is mainly valuable for Front Runner opening consistency.

rules.reason: Short races leave little time to recover from poor early navigation.
Improves opening lane and position consistency for Front Runner.

positioning_rules.reason: Direct strategic positioning value not represented by lengths gained.

tail_held_high.notes: The batch does not activate enough mid-race skills, causing a false zero. The skill is a useful generic mid-race velocity option when the build has the required activation density.

rules.reason: The trigger is less reliable in a short race.
Strong when paired with a normal mid-race skill package.
Longer mid-race gives both trigger reliability and useful duration.
High trigger opportunity in skill-dense long builds.

updrafters.notes: Umalator currently gives a false zero. The skill is a viable Mile late-race passing/acceleration option for runners positioned toward the back.

rules.reason: Can trigger, but Pace Chaser is not reliably in the back half.
Good fit for the expected late-race position.
Very good fit for the expected late-race position.

leader_s_pride.notes: The simulator captures some velocity gain but not the full value of winning early Front Runner position contests.

positioning_rules.reason: Helps win or defend early/mid-race Front Runner positioning.

ramp_up.notes: Passing mid-race can improve access to the desired acceleration position beyond the direct velocity gain.

positioning_rules.reason: Limited passing opportunities but occasional position-contest value.
Passing mid-race contributes to reaching the intended late-race position.

sprint_corners.notes: Corner velocity can be strategically important for entering the acceleration zone in the correct position, especially in Sprint.

positioning_rules.reason: Sprint position is difficult to recover after the final corner.

mile_corners.notes: Adds a small position-before-acceleration component not fully captured by raw time gain.

positioning_rules.reason: Useful for securing the desired position before the decisive phase.

medium_corners.notes: Adds a small position-before-acceleration component not fully captured by raw time gain.

positioning_rules.reason: Useful for securing the desired position before the decisive phase.

long_corners.notes: Adds a small position-before-acceleration component; lower than shorter distances because recovery opportunities are greater.

positioning_rules.reason: Useful positioning support, but less decisive globally than in shorter races.

front_runner_corners.notes: Style corner skill receives the same small strategic positioning component as distance corner skills.

positioning_rules.reason: Important Sprint position retention.
Helps retain the desired position before acceleration.
Helps retain the desired position before acceleration.
Useful but less globally decisive in Long.

pace_chaser_corners.notes: Style corner skill receives the same small strategic positioning component as distance corner skills.

positioning_rules.reason: Important Sprint position retention.
Helps secure the desired position before acceleration.
Helps secure the desired position before acceleration.
Useful but less globally decisive in Long.

late_surger_corners.notes: Style corner skill receives the same small strategic positioning component as distance corner skills.

positioning_rules.reason: Important Sprint positioning before acceleration.
Helps reach the desired position before acceleration.
Helps reach the desired position before acceleration.
Useful but less globally decisive in Long.

end_closer_corners.notes: Style corner skill receives the same small strategic positioning component as distance corner skills.

positioning_rules.reason: Important Sprint positioning before acceleration.
Helps reach the desired position before acceleration.
Helps reach the desired position before acceleration.
Useful but less globally decisive in Long.
